title: Referral
description: A lead or customer referred by a FirstPromoter promoter.

email.description: Email address of the referred person.

uid.description: External unique identifier for this referral in the merchant's system.

plan_name.description: Name of the subscription plan the referral is on.

mrr.description: Monthly recurring revenue attributed to this referral.

promoter_id.description: ID of the promoter who referred this person.

campaign_id.description: ID of the campaign through which this referral was tracked.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the referral was first recorded.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the referral record was last updated.
